title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Sasken Technologies in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sasken Technologies:
Sasken Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies!
